s.name: Caeda
s.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 1 · #1 unit in the game — Wing Spear shreds cavalry, knights, and generals (most bosses); recruits the most units via talk after Marth

s.name: Sedgar
s.subtitle: Horseman · Ch. 5 · Hidden gem — extraordinary growth rates; reclass to General for near-immortal stats or Hero for offense

s.name: Wolf
s.subtitle: Horseman · Ch. 5 · Top offensive unit with great growths; highly flexible via reclassing

s.name: Minerva
s.subtitle: Dracoknight · Ch. 10 · Outstanding pre-promote; high base Str, mobility, and weapon ranks; can reclass to Paladin or General

s.name: Barst
s.subtitle: Fighter · Ch. 2 · Deceptively excellent growths; one of the strongest long-term investments in the game

s.name: Lena
s.subtitle: Cleric · Ch. 3 · Best support unit; high staff rank at join means she can use Warp as soon as you find it; irreplaceable utility

a.name: Cain
a.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1 · Well-rounded all-rounder; great growths; can reclass to Dracoknight or Hero

a.name: Abel
a.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1 · Slightly more defensive than Cain; can reclass to Dracoknight

a.name: Jagen
a.subtitle: Paladin · P-1 · Classic Jagen archetype — exceptional early bases, low growths; more valuable on higher difficulties; can reclass to Dracoknight

a.name: Ogma
a.subtitle: Mercenary · Ch. 2 · Great early base stats; reliable fighter; can reclass to Swordmaster or Sniper

a.name: Hardin
a.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 5 · 100% HP growth, 60% Def growth; dominant tank; can reclass to General or Dracoknight

a.name: Navarre
a.subtitle: Myrmidon · Ch. 3 · Blazing speed; talk with Caeda; can reclass to Hero

a.name: Merric
a.subtitle: Mage · Ch. 4 · Joins with Excalibur (vs. fliers); only mage before Linde; can reclass to Bishop

a.name: Wendell
a.subtitle: Sage · Ch. 5 · Already promoted Sage; low growths but immediately useful; talk with Marth or Merric

a.name: Catria
a.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 14 · Better speed growth than Palla (55%); can reclass to Dracoknight

a.name: Palla
a.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 14 · Reliable flier; talk with Marth; can reclass to Dracoknight

a.name: Jeorge
a.subtitle: Sniper · Ch. 9 · Pre-promote; joins with Parthia (grants +5 Res); can reclass to Horseman

a.name: Jake
a.subtitle: Ballistician · Ch. 11 · Incomparable 10-range ballista attacks; devastating on defense; talk with Caeda

a.name: Beck
a.subtitle: Ballistician · Ch. 13 · Same ballista utility as Jake; visit village with Marth

a.name: Marth
a.subtitle: Lord · P-1 · Required; only unit who can seize and open chests; Rapier vs. cavalry/armor; receives Falchion in Ch. 23 for final boss

a.name: Xane
a.subtitle: Chameleon · Ch. 16 · Copies any deployed ally's class and stats each turn; unique and endlessly flexible

a.name: Linde
a.subtitle: Mage · Ch. 11 · Best magic unit; Aura tome (effective vs. cavalry); excellent Magic and Speed growths; can reclass to Bishop

a.name: Tiki
a.subtitle: Manakete · Ch. 19x · 100% HP growth; Divinestone; dominant late-game — requires Bantu alive to recruit; talk with Bantu

b.name: Julian
b.subtitle: Thief · Ch. 3 · Only lock-pick unit; can open all chests and doors; never let him die; can reclass to Assassin

b.name: Caesar
b.subtitle: Mercenary · Ch. 8 · Decent base stats; solid swordsman for mid-game

b.name: Radd
b.subtitle: Myrmidon · Ch. 8 · Decent speed; complements Caesar; both join together

b.name: Cord
b.subtitle: Fighter · Ch. 2 · Decent Fighter; overshadowed by Barst but serviceable

b.name: Maria
b.subtitle: Cleric · Ch. 10 · Talk with Marth to free her, then use her to unlock Minerva; decent healer after that

b.name: Dolph
b.subtitle: Knight · Ch. 12 · Joins automatically with the Ch. 12 group; sacrifice candidate or niche armor utility

b.name: Macellan
b.subtitle: Knight · Ch. 12 · Same situation as Dolph; joins automatically in Ch. 12

b.name: Roger
b.subtitle: Knight · Ch. 8 · Talk with Caeda; armor knight with same issues as Dolph/Macellan

c.name: Draug
c.subtitle: Knight · Ch. 1 · Terrible speed (3) — reclass to Paladin to be viable; still falls behind cavaliers

c.name: Bantu
c.subtitle: Manakete · Ch. 7 · Terrible growths — keep alive solely to recruit Tiki in Ch. 19; never invest EXP

c.name: Athena
c.subtitle: Myrmidon · Gaiden 6x · Decent speed and skill; joins via Gaiden 6x village

c.name: Astram
c.subtitle: Hero · Ch. 13 · Talk with Midia; solid stats but joins later than ideal

c.name: Matthis
c.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 4 · Lena's brother; talk with Lena; mediocre but mounted

c.name: Etzel
c.subtitle: Sorcerer · Gaiden 17x · Late join but pre-promoted dark mage; don't kill him in 17x

c.name: Horace
c.subtitle: General · Gaiden 12x · Pre-promoted General; don't kill him in Gaiden 12x to recruit

c.name: Ymir
c.subtitle: Warrior · Gaiden 20x · Talk with Marth and complete the chapter; decent Warrior late

d.name: Wrys
d.subtitle: Curate · Ch. 1 · Weakest healer; visit village with Marth; primary sacrifice candidate

d.name: Castor
d.subtitle: Hunter · Ch. 2 · Mediocre; talk with Caeda; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Gordin
d.subtitle: Archer · P-2 · Low speed; poor growths; consider reclassing to Horseman or use as sacrifice

d.name: Bord
d.subtitle: Fighter · Ch. 2 · Joins with Barst and Cord; significantly weaker than Barst; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Darros
d.subtitle: Pirate · Ch. 2 · Talk with Marth; mediocre pirate unit; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Frey
d.subtitle: Cavalier · P-1 · Recommended sacrifice in P-1 to let Marth escape; does not rejoin

d.name: Norne
d.subtitle: Archer · Ch. 1 · Conditional recruit (joins if you have low unit count); weak archer

d.name: Roshea
d.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 5 · Below-average cavalier; joins with the Aurelis group; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Vyland
d.subtitle: Cavalier · Ch. 5 · Same as Roshea; joins as filler; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Rickard
d.subtitle: Thief · Ch. 6 · Second thief; Julian handles locks; Rickard is pure sacrifice filler

d.name: Tomas
d.subtitle: Archer · Ch. 12 · Joins with Midia group; weak archer; sacrifice candidate

d.name: Boah
d.subtitle: Bishop · Ch. 12 · Old bishop; joins with Midia group; outclassed by Lena and Wendell

d.name: Midia
d.subtitle: Paladin · Ch. 12 · Auto-join; decent mounted unit but joins underleveled relative to promoted enemies

d.name: Est
d.subtitle: Pegasus Knight · Ch. 18 · Baby flier of the trio; joins very late and severely underleveled

d.name: Lorenz
d.subtitle: General · Ch. 20 · Old and slow; talk with Marth or Caeda; recruit only for Gaiden unlock filler

d.name: Arran / Samson
d.subtitle: Paladin / Hero · Ch. 16 · Mutually exclusive village choice; both are weak late-game pre-promotes

d.name: Nagi
d.subtitle: Manakete · Gaiden 24x · Alternate wielder of Falchion; clear Gaiden 24x to recruit

d.name: Elice
d.subtitle: Cleric · Ch. 24 · Marth's sister; auto-join in Ch. 24; Aum staff user but joins at the end
